name: Tales Of Miravia
short_description: A souls-like RPG with tough combat and subtle humor. Purify crystals, explore dangerous dungeons, and complete quests in a world that doesn’t take itself too seriously.
detailed_description:
Tales of Miravia

A humor-driven fantasy RPG with Souls-like combat, where you play an unconventional hero tasked with purifying corrupted crystals in a world that is as dangerous as it is absurd.

Explore Miravia, take on missions, delve into deadly dungeons, and face punishing enemies—while the game balances challenge with light-hearted humor and unexpected moments.

Key Features

✨ Exploration and missions with a humorous twist
Travel across diverse regions of Miravia, complete missions, and uncover events that blend real danger with playful dialogue and comedic situations.

⚔️ Challenging Souls-like combat
Combat rewards timing, positioning, and smart use of abilities. Mistakes are punished, learning is encouraged, and mastery feels earned.

🏰 Dangerous dungeons
Venture into dungeons filled with enemies, traps, and tough encounters designed to test your skill and persistence.

🎮 Optional content and minigames
Side activities that add variety and extra rewards without disrupting the core experience.

🌤️ Dynamic visual effects
Changing weather, atmospheric lighting, and animations that bring the world of Miravia to life.

📖 A fantasy story with personality
A straightforward narrative that supports the action, enriched with humor and a tone that doesn’t take itself too seriously.

Tales of Miravia is an actively developed project.
Your feedback helps refine the challenge, expand content, and improve the overall experience.
